nasb.text: When Pashhur the priest, the son of Immer, who was chief officer in the house of the Lord, heard Jeremiah prophesying these things,

esv.text: Now Pashhur the priest, the son of Immer, who was chief officer in the house of the Lord, heard Jeremiah prophesying these things.

cnv.text: 音麥的兒子巴施戶珥祭司，就是耶和華殿的總管，他聽見了耶利米預言這些事，

ccb.text: 音麦的儿子巴施户珥祭司在耶和华的殿中做总管。他听见耶利米预言这些事，
